w:r.w:t: 期末选词填空整理（按第3题 / 第6题分类）
说明：原图片内容自第二单元起（未见第一单元内容），故下文同样从第二单元开始排列。黄色高亮 + 加粗部分为挖空考查的单词/短语（含中文释义）。
To encourage innovation among employees, the company has canceled a number of regulations and procedures that may
翻译：为鼓励员工创新，公司取消了一系列可能阻碍创意想法产生的规章制度。
Chinese consumers embrace healthy lifestyles, and many are changing their
habits to further reduce the consumption of sugar.
翻译：中国消费者崇尚健康的生活方式，许多人正在改变饮食习惯，以进一步减少糖分摄入。
If a couple treat each other with trust, respect, and honesty, nothing can make the bond of their marriage
翻译：如果夫妻之间彼此信任、尊重、坦诚相待，没有什么能够破坏他们的婚姻关系。
his lecture by providing some interesting background information, which helps students better understand the subject.
翻译：这位教授通常会以一些有趣的背景资料开篇授课，帮助学生更好地理解课程内容。
Humorous and good at telling jokes, he
laughter and applause from the audience whenever he is on the stage.
翻译：他风趣幽默、擅长讲笑话，每次登台都能引得台下观众阵阵欢笑与掌声。
with many things we do today, making our lives far more convenient and efficient than before.
翻译：如今，科技与我们日常生活中的诸多事物深度交织，让我们的生活比以往更加便捷高效。
The railroad, which was about 2,000 kilometers long,
the whole country together and made its rapid industrialization possible.
翻译：这条全长约2000公里的铁路，将整个国家紧密联结在一起，推动国家快速实现工业化。
The novel tells the story of a young man who struggles hard to accomplish his dreams that
翻译：这部小说讲述了一位年轻人竭力追梦、与现实相抗争的故事。
What attracted me most in the museum was a stone sculpture of an ancient warrior in a(n)
, complete with helmet, sword, and shield.
翻译：博物馆里最吸引我的，是一尊古代武士石雕，武士身着全套服饰，配有头盔、佩剑与盾牌。
He fully researched the history of European immigration to North America to write a(n)
翻译：他深入研究了欧洲人移民北美的历史，撰写了一篇关于移民生活的真实纪实报道。
During the discussion, the professor was mostly listening and only occasionally gave a few remarks to bring
翻译：讨论期间，教授大多在倾听，仅偶尔发表几句评论，让讨论的问题清晰明了。
Today many governments around the world are
to invest in technology to tackle social and environmental problems.
翻译：如今全球许多政府都热衷于投资科技，以解决社会与环境问题。
Situated in the heart of the town, the hotel is an ideal
for business meetings, weddings, and other large group events.
翻译：这家酒店位于镇中心，是举办商务会议、婚礼及其他大型集体活动的理想场地。
For small businesses, online videos are a great way to
their products or services to new and existing customers.
翻译：对小企业而言，网络视频是向新老客户展示产品或服务的绝佳方式。
and rapid growth of e-commerce has reshaped the way business is conducted, making online shopping an integral part of our life.
翻译：电子商务的兴起与快速发展重塑了商业运作模式，让网购成为我们生活中不可或缺的一部分。
The new kindergarten will get a generous
of funds to improve its outdoor facilities.
翻译：这所新建幼儿园将获得一笔可观的拨款，用于改善户外设施。
His job involves deciding on matters with different objectives that often
with each other, e.g., company profits vs. investor returns.
翻译：他的工作需要处理目标时常相互冲突的事务，例如公司利润与投资者回报之间的矛盾。
The structures of the wings of a bird and a butterfly are
because they are basically similar in shape and function.
翻译：鸟类与蝴蝶的翅膀结构相似，二者在外形和功能上基本一致。
Despite challenges, the Chinese economy continues to enjoy strong
and remains a crucial contributor to world economic growth.
翻译：尽管面临挑战，中国经济仍保持强劲发展势头，持续为世界经济增长作出重要贡献。
As the company's first CFO for many years, Bob has played a leading role in
the company through a significant growth period.
翻译：作为公司多年来的首位首席财务官，鲍勃在引领公司度过重要发展阶段中发挥了核心作用。
During the restoration, there were many strict conservation guidelines to which we had to adhere in order to maintain the
翻译：修复期间，我们必须遵守多项严格的保护准则，以维持建筑的完整性。
response to a call bell communicates respect and caring and hence contributes to patient satisfaction.
翻译：研究表明，护士及时响应呼叫铃能传递尊重与关怀，从而提升患者满意度。
The air and rivers in this area are getting cleaner, and attempts to preserve animal species and their
翻译：该地区的空气与河流愈发洁净，保护动物物种及其栖息地的举措基本取得了成功。
so much of her time and energy that she needs a rest after finishing it.
翻译：这个项目耗费了她大量时间与精力，完成后需要休息。
and the availability of a wider range of choices, consumption is now based more on what one wants, rather than what one needs.
翻译：随着生活富足、选择愈发多样，如今消费更多源于个人欲望，而非实际需求。
of plastics into the oceans endangers the marine species and subsequently human lives.
翻译：对海洋不当处置塑料会危及海洋生物，进而威胁人类生命。
The movement of trains along the line was badly affected after the signaling system
翻译：暴雨导致信号系统瘫痪，沿线列车运行受到严重影响。
of natural resources is a global environmental issue that jeopardizes the livelihoods of billions of people on our planet.
翻译：自然资源枯竭是全球性环境问题，危及全球数十亿人的生计。
Insects are important sources of food for other animals. Hundreds of species of birds would
if there were no insects to feed on.
翻译：昆虫是其他动物的重要食物来源，若没有昆虫可供捕食，数百种鸟类将会灭绝。
Scientists in China have carried out advanced research on hydrology and water resources of inland rivers, and have made
翻译：中国科学家针对内陆河流水文学与水资源开展深入研究，近年取得了重大成果。
in developing countries has risen rapidly due to improvements in nutrition, medicine, and public health.
翻译：由于营养、医疗与公共卫生条件的改善，发展中国家的人均预期寿命迅速延长。
Jonathan found himself lying on a bench in the park after waking up from a long dream in which a fierce animal
翻译：乔纳森从一场漫长的梦中醒来，发现自己躺在公园长椅上，梦里有一只凶猛的野兽在黑暗中跟踪他。
Up until that time, I hadn't thought much about classical music; instead, what really
翻译：在那之前我对古典音乐兴趣不大，真正吸引我的是流行歌曲。
Some deadly diseases have been virtually eliminated thanks to the dedicated efforts to
翻译：得益于为全球民众接种疫苗的不懈努力，一些致命疾病几乎被根除。
can be effectively prevented when doctors abide by professional regulations strictly.
翻译：研究表明，医生严格遵守行业规范，能够有效预防医疗事故。
Consisting of three episodes, the documentary
China's dramatic economic and social development in the last century.
翻译：这部三集纪录片记述了中国上世纪波澜壮阔的经济与社会发展历程。
He is planning to retire as executive director of the organization in a few months, but he has agreed to stay on until a(n)
翻译：他计划数月后辞去该组织执行董事一职，但同意留任直至继任者上任。
The clothing you wear to the gym shouldn't be too tight because you don't want to work out in something that
翻译：健身服不宜过紧，不要穿会束缚活动的衣物运动。
The company decided to redesign the advertisement after realizing that it might
翻译：公司意识到这则广告可能招致消费者批评，决定重新设计。
After hearing about the family's difficulties, all the neighbors felt great
and offered to help in whatever way they could.
翻译：得知这家人的困境后，邻居们都深表同情，并主动提供力所能及的帮助。
In his response to the job offer from the company, he
healthcare benefits available to full-time employees to make a final decision.
翻译：在回复公司的录用通知时，他询问了全职员工可享受的医疗福利，以便做出最终决定。
They got lost while hiking in the mountain, spending many hours
the dense forest before finding their way back to the trail.
(跌跌撞撞地走过；磕磕绊绊进行)
翻译：他们在山里徒步时迷路了，跌跌撞撞穿行在茂密的森林中数小时，才找到返回步道的路。
Wherever you go for college and whatever major you pursue, you should actively
new opportunities and experiences to enrich your learning.
翻译：无论你去哪所大学，选择什么专业，都应该主动发掘新的机会与经历，丰富自己的学识。
As part of an ecosystem that contains numerous living species, we human beings
not only ourselves but also other species that share the same planet.
翻译：作为位于众多生物的生态系统的一员，人类不仅要对自己负责，更要对同一个星球的其他物种负责。
Raised in a family where being frugal was a virtue, we never got rid of anything we had until it completely
翻译：在以节俭为美德的家庭中长大，我们从不会丢弃物品，直到它完全用坏、磨损。
According to the law, art museums are considered non-profit organizations and can
some taxes if they meet certain criteria.
翻译：根据法律规定，艺术博物馆属于非营利组织，符合条件即可免缴部分税款。
and support the school's measures to lower academic pressure on kids and encourage their participation in outdoor activities.
翻译：家长们都赞同并支持学校为减轻孩子学业压力、鼓励参与户外活动而采取的措施。
their mobile phones, even to the point that they become restless if they are not with their devices.
翻译：如今有些人沉迷于手机，甚至一旦离开手机就会焦虑不安。
Over the last decade, the trend toward working from home has slowly
翻译：过去十年，居家办公的趋势在全国范围内慢慢流行起来。
the experience of participating in the summer camp
life-changing and the best time they've ever had.
翻译：许多学生都将参加夏令营的经历誉为改变人生的经历，也是他们度过的最美好时光。
These workshops provide students with opportunities to experiment with different techniques and
翻译：这些研讨班为学生提供机会，尝试不同技巧，并在良好的环境中将所学知识付诸实践。
The artist restored the painting and
, revealing the fine colors of the rainbow, which were lost beneath layers of dirt.
翻译：艺术家修复了这幅画，使其重焕生机，展现出被层层污渐遮盖的绚烂彩虹色彩。
When students are exposed to environments that
learning, the chances of achieving their educational goals increase.
翻译：当学生身处有利于学习的环境中时，实现学业目标的几率会提高。
We should be open to new ways of thinking,
what we do, and strive to improve ourselves on the basis of our experience.
翻译：我们应该秉持开放的思维方式，反思自身所为，并基于经验努力提升自我。
Several hours later, the budget meeting
and the board members filed out of the room.
翻译：数小时后，预算会议渐近结束，董事会成员陆续离场。
Some research suggests that the history of the Mid-Autumn Festival can
翻译：有研究表明，中秋节的历史可以追溯到三千多年前。
the contract specifications, the buyer can request several different kinds of compensation.
翻译：如果货物不符合合同规格，买方可以要求多种赔偿。
The company tried to release an improved milk chocolate bar using condensed milk rather than powdered milk, but it
翻译：公司尝试推出用炼乳而非奶粉制作的改良牛奶巧克力，但效果和之前的产品并无改善。
For the sake of health, we should
the intake of high-calorie and high-fat foods with poor nutritional value.
翻译：为了健康，我们应该减少摄入营养价值低的高热量、高脂肪食物。
Wastewater and the increasing atmospheric CO2 levels are two great environmental challenges that
翻译：废水与大气二氧化碳浓度上升是两大环境难题，威胁着人类的生命。
The recent oil price rise was found to
the changes in supply and demand, but came as a result of uncertainty about the market.
翻译：近期油价上涨被发现与供需变化无关，而是源于市场的不确定性。
Most experts agreed that the cost of conducting the experiment must
the potential benefit to society the research might provide.
翻译：大多数专家认为，开展实验的成本必须与研究可能带来的社会潜在效益进行权衡。
natural resources and minimize waste disposal, it is necessary for everyone to get into the habit of recycling.
翻译：为节约自然资源、减少垃圾排放，每个人都必须养成回收利用的习惯。
Many phishing emails try to deceive you with the threat that your account will
if it is not updated right away.
翻译：许多钓鱼邮件试图以账户若不立即更新就会陷入风险为由进行诈骗。
when the vulnerable groups needed help, and he made a difference!
翻译：他富有同情心、乐于助人，弱势群体需要帮助时，他从不袖手旁观，并切实做出了改变。
The international meeting released a joint statement
all countries in the world to work together to tackle global issues like poverty and climate change.
翻译：此次国际会议发布联合声明，呼吁世界各国携手应对贫困、气候变化等全球性问题。
We didn't expect that such a small art show would attract many visitors, so it was quite a surprise that more than a hundred people
翻译：我们没料到这场小型艺术展能吸引众多参观者，因此一百多人现身画廊着实令人意外。
A common theme in science fiction films is that aliens
the earth and then their attempt is defeated by humans using less advanced technology.
翻译：科幻电影的常见主题是外星人围攻地球，最终其进攻被人类用相对落后的技术击退。
China and some other countries have committed to net zero emissions of greenhouse gases by mid-century, and many more are
翻译：中国及其他部分国家承诺在本世纪中叶实现温室气体净零排放，越来越多国家正效仿跟进。
With the improvement of smart safety features of modern cars, road accidents are expected to decrease as drivers can
potential dangers or bad traffic conditions.
翻译：随着现代汽车智能安全功能升级，驾驶能够提前在危险与不良路况，道路交通事故有望减少。
To help residents prepare for the predicted snowstorm, the local weather bureau
early warnings and provided updates through various channels.
翻译：为帮助居民应对即将到来的暴风雪，当地气象局发布预警，并通过多渠道更新信息。
